completed_tasks.name: Phase 1 planning package
completed_tasks.progress: project scaffolding docs, phase context, research, executable plans, session handoff artifacts, and git/bootstrap continuity cleanup created

blockers.description: Stack is not locked yet; execute 01-01-PLAN.md before broad scaffolding
blockers.workaround: Write ADR-001 first, then align root workspace files and scripts to that decision

decisions.decision: Phase 1 is documentation-first and ADR-first before broad scaffolding
decisions.rationale: Future sessions must be able to continue from repository files alone

decisions.decision: Repository shape should separate runtime apps from shared packages
decisions.rationale: This preserves maintainability and supports a dedicated terminal worker

decisions.decision: Fake adapters and local smoke verification are mandatory foundation outputs
decisions.rationale: Later phases must be testable without the production terminal

next_action: Read .planning/phases/01-foundation-contracts/.continue-here.md, then start Phase 1 execution with 01-01-PLAN.md
context_notes: The repository is organized for session independence. Git is operational on PATH and the repo is on main. In this Codex desktop environment, some gsd-tools git steps may need an unrestricted shell because sandboxed Node child-process spawns can return EPERM. Do not skip ADR-001 or jump straight into feature scaffolding; Phase 1 exists to lock stack, structure, contracts, and verification.
